examples: In fact, my mother wanted her children to see themselves much like the gardenia: lovely, strong and perfect.
Every year on my birthday, from the time I turned twelve, a bunch of white gardenia was delivered to my house.
You will not find that type of gardenia.
Among Barkin's jewels is a ring made up of 850 diamonds sculpted to look like a gardenia blossom.
She may be gone forever, or one day I'll smell a hint of gardenia and maybe it will be her.
